description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by lush landscaping, including rows of purple-flowering trees and tall green shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a modern, open-plan interior layout with visible kitchen, living, and bedroom areas. Large windows line the exterior walls, allowing ample natural light to enter the living spaces. The property includes a backyard with a swing set, a small shed, and a patio area, suggesting family-friendly amenities. The front of the bungalow is defined by a neat row of trees and a clear entry path. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings featuring purple trees and a backyard play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a row of purple trees, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swing set, shed, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back row of trees, patio area, and the bungalow's flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the backyard amenities, shed, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple sides
